Class MenuDAO

java.lang.Object
org.team55.dao.MenuDAO
public class MenuDAO extends Object
Data Access Object (DAO) class for MenuItem. Provides methods to interact with the menu_items table in the database, including retrieving all menu items, retrieving active cashier menu items, making a menu item active/inactive, adding a new menu item, updating an existing menu item, retrieving ingredients by category, retrieving ingredient units, and retrieving ingredients for a menu item.
Author:
Fernando Munoz Garza, Ray Cheng

    Description
    static boolean
    addMenuItem(String name, String price, List<String> ingredientNames, List<Double> ingredientQuantities, boolean seasonal)
    Adds a new menu item to the database.

    getActiveMenuItems()
    Retrieves all active menu items from the database and returns them as an ObservableList of MenuItem objects.

    Retrieves all menu items from the database and returns them as an ObservableList of MenuItem objects.

    getIngredientsByCategory(String category)
    Retrieves a list of ingredient names from the database for a given category.
    static String

    Retrieves the quantity unit for a given ingredient name from the database.
    static LinkedHashMap<String,Double>
    getMenuItemIngredients(int menuItemId)
    Retrieves a LinkedHashMap of ingredient names and quantities for a given menu item ID from the database, displays previously selected ingredients during an update.

    Sets a menu item to active or inactive in the database based on the given menu item ID and active status.

  • Constructor Details

    • MenuDAO

      public MenuDAO()

  • Method Details

    • getAllMenuItems

      public static javafx.collections.ObservableList<MenuItem> getAllMenuItems()
      Retrieves all menu items from the database and returns them as an ObservableList of MenuItem objects. Used for displaying menu items in the manager view.
      Returns:
      ObservableList<MenuItem> list of all menu items

    • addMenuItem

      public static boolean addMenuItem(String name, String price, List<String> ingredientNames, List<Double> ingredientQuantities, boolean seasonal) throws SQLException
      Adds a new menu item to the database.
      Parameters:
      name - New item name
      price - New item price
      ingredientNames - List of ingredient names
      ingredientQuantities - how much of each ingredient is needed for the menu item
      seasonal - whether the menu item is a seasonal menu item or not
      Returns:
      boolean indicating success of the operation
      Throws:
      SQLException - Database query error

    • updateMenuItemFull

      public static boolean updateMenuItemFull(int menuItemId, String newName, Double newPrice, List<String> ingredientNames, List<Double> ingredientQuantities, boolean seasonal) throws SQLException
      Updates ANY existing menu item in the database with the given parameters. Only parameters that are not null will be updated.
      Parameters:
      menuItemId - Menu item ID # to be updated
      newName - Updated menu item name
      newPrice - Updated menu item price
      ingredientNames - Updated ingredients list
      ingredientQuantities - Updated ingredient quantities
      seasonal - If item is seasonal
      Returns:
      boolean indicating success of the operation
      Throws:
      SQLException - Database query error

    • getIngredientsByCategory

      public static List<String> getIngredientsByCategory(String category)
      Retrieves a list of ingredient names from the database for a given category. Used for populating the combo box in the add menu item view.
      Parameters:
      category - (milk base, sweeteners, topping, etc.)
      Returns:
      List<String> list of ingredient names in the given category

    • getIngredientUnit

      public static String getIngredientUnit(String ingredientName)
      Retrieves the quantity unit for a given ingredient name from the database. Used for displaying the unit next to the quantity field in the add/update menu item view
      Parameters:
      ingredientName - name of the ingredient to retrieve the unit for
      Returns:
      String unit of the ingredient (unit, g, mL, L, etc.)

    • getMenuItemIngredients

      public static LinkedHashMap<String,Double> getMenuItemIngredients(int menuItemId)
      Retrieves a LinkedHashMap of ingredient names and quantities for a given menu item ID from the database, displays previously selected ingredients during an update.
      Parameters:
      menuItemId -
      Returns:
      LinkedHashMap<String, Double> map of ingredient names and quantities

    • getActiveMenuItems

      public static javafx.collections.ObservableList<MenuItem> getActiveMenuItems()
      Retrieves all active menu items from the database and returns them as an ObservableList of MenuItem objects. Used for displaying menu items in the cashier view.
      Returns:
      ObservableList<MenuItem> list of active menu items

    • setMenuItemActive

      public static boolean setMenuItemActive(int menuItemId, boolean active) throws SQLException
      Sets a menu item to active or inactive in the database based on the given menu item ID and active status. Determines whether a menu item is displayed in the cashier view or not.
      Parameters:
      menuItemId -
      active - true to set the menu item to active, false to set it to inactive
      Returns:
      boolean indicating success of the operation
      Throws:
      SQLException
